metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2409
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Enhanced synapse formation by overexpression of PTPRT.
Loss of synapses by knockdown of PTPRT.
Knockdown of PTPRT in cultured neurons (DIV 13-16) decreased the frequency, but not amplitude of mEPSCs.. Experimental description: Materials and methods
Cell culture and transfection
Primary hippocampal neuronal cultures were as described earlier (Lee et al, 2003)
Neuron Culture, Transfection, and Immunostaining-Primary hippocampal neuronal cultures were prepared from rat embryonic brain (embryonic day 18)

DNA constructs
Full-length human PTPRT (NM_133170, aa 1-1460; from a human brain cDNA library; Clontech) was subcloned into GW1-CMV.

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
